title: matelea bolivarensis
intro: Matelea bolivarensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as a type of milkweed vine due to its milky latex. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Matelea bolivarensis include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
